intro: Planchonella javensis, also known as the Java plum or Javan plum, is a species of fruit-bearing tree native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful for alleviating symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. Bioactive constituents of Planchonella javensis include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
